menstrual.tip: Iron-rich foods help replenish what you lose.
menstrual.bodyExplanation: Your estrogen and progesterone are at their lowest right now. Your uterine lining is shedding, which is why you might feel tired, crampy or more emotional than usual. This is a natural reset — your body is doing exactly what it should.
quotes: Rest is not laziness. It's wisdom.
You don't have to earn your rest.
Slowing down is its own kind of strength.
Be gentle with yourself today.
Your body is working hard. Let it.
Some days, surviving is enough.
Stillness is productive too.
You are allowed to do less.
Warmth, comfort, and quiet — that's the assignment today.
Honor the ebb as much as the flow.
There is power in going inward.
Rest now so you can bloom later.
Your sensitivity right now is not weakness — it's depth.
Not every day needs to be a big day.
Give yourself the same care you'd give someone you love.
Today, let things be enough as they are.
Softness is not fragility.
The quietest days are sometimes the most necessary.
You are not behind. You are exactly where you need to be.
This phase will pass. Be patient with your body.
Cozy is a valid life choice.
You can reschedule the world.
Your body knows what it's doing.
Let yourself be held by rest.
Low energy is information, not failure.
dos: Drink warm water or herbal tea throughout the day
Use a heat pad on your lower abdomen if cramping
Go to bed 30 minutes earlier than usual
Cancel or reschedule things that feel like too much
Eat something warm and iron-rich
Take a slow walk outside if you have energy
Give yourself permission to say no today
Watch something comforting instead of stimulating
Eat dark chocolate — seriously, it helps
Have a bath or a long warm shower
Take a nap if your body is asking for one
Write down how you're feeling — it can help
Call or text someone who makes you feel safe
Wear the most comfortable thing you own
Eat little and often rather than big meals
donts: Don't push through exhaustion just to seem productive
Don't skip meals — your blood sugar needs stability
Don't make big decisions if you're feeling low
Don't compare your energy to other days or other people
Don't drink too much coffee — it can worsen cramps
Don't overload your schedule
Don't feel guilty for needing more rest than usual
Don't ignore pain that feels unusually severe
Don't do intense exercise if your body is saying no
Don't spend too much time doom-scrolling
Don't expect yourself to be at your social best right now
Don't ignore your cravings entirely — they're signals
Don't hold your breath — breathe deeply and slowly
Don't try to power through with caffeine alone
Don't judge your mood — it will shift

follicular.tip: Estrogen is rising — fresh meals support your energy levels.
follicular.bodyExplanation: Estrogen is climbing and your energy is returning. Your body is preparing to ovulate — follicles in your ovaries are growing and one is getting ready to release an egg. You might notice sharper focus, better mood and a genuine desire to get things done. This is a great time to start new projects.
quotes: New energy, new possibilities.
You're just getting started.
Spring is coming — inside and out.
Plant the seeds of what you want to grow.
Your momentum is building.
Say yes to the things that excite you.
This is your fresh start energy.
Clarity is returning — use it.
You have more capacity than you think.
Ideas are flowing. Write them down.
Something new is beginning.
Let yourself be curious today.
This is the energy you've been waiting for.
You're allowed to feel good.
Step into this phase with openness.
Your body is waking up. Let your mind follow.
Do the thing you've been putting off.
This is a good week to begin.
Lean into the lightness.
You have the energy — trust it.
Small actions now create big momentum later.
Optimism looks good on you.
Let your ideas out of your head and into the world.
The fog is lifting.
This phase is an invitation — say yes.
dos: Start something you've been putting off
Try a new recipe or a new place for lunch
Write down your ideas — your brain is sharp right now
Make plans with people you enjoy
Go outside and move your body in a way that feels good
Tackle the task on your to-do list you've been avoiding
Learn something new — your brain is absorbing well
Set an intention for the next few weeks
Book something to look forward to
Say yes to a social invitation
Eat fresh, colourful food
Start a new habit — this is the best phase for it
Have a longer conversation with someone interesting
Get some morning sunlight
Do something creative just for fun
donts: Don't waste this energy on things that don't matter to you
Don't overcommit just because you feel good
Don't skip breakfast — fuel your rising energy
Don't isolate if you're feeling social — lean into it
Don't second-guess your ideas before you've written them down
Don't ignore your intuition
Don't stay up too late — protect your sleep even now
Don't spend all your energy on other people's priorities
Don't forget to hydrate — energy phases can make you forget
Don't rush past the good feeling — notice it
Don't take on so much that you crash by ovulation
Don't let perfectionism stop you from starting
Don't skip the things that bring you joy
Don't ignore signs of stress just because energy is high
Don't forget this phase doesn't last forever — use it well

ovulation.tip: Anti-inflammatory foods support your peak energy days.
ovulation.bodyExplanation: You're at or near peak estrogen right now, and a mature egg has been released from your ovary. LH (luteinising hormone) surged to make that happen. You're likely at your most energetic, confident and communicative. Your body temperature rises slightly after ovulation and you may feel more outgoing than usual.
quotes: You are at your most radiant.
Speak up — your voice carries right now.
This is your peak. Use it with intention.
Confidence looks good on you.
Say the thing you've been holding back.
You are magnetic right now.
Show up fully today.
Your energy is contagious — share it wisely.
Go for it. Seriously.
This is the week to make the ask.
You have everything you need right now.
Trust yourself completely today.
Your presence is powerful.
Connect deeply with someone today.
Be seen. You deserve to be.
Your best ideas are ready to be shared.
This energy is a gift — don't waste it on doubt.
Lead with warmth and watch what opens up.
You are in full bloom.
Make the call. Send the email. Have the conversation.
Now is the time for bold moves.
Stand in your light today.
You have more to offer than you realise.
This is your moment — step into it.
Shine without apology.
dos: Have the important conversation you've been avoiding
Schedule a presentation, interview or important meeting
Spend time with people who energise you
Ask for what you want — your confidence is high
Do something that makes you feel beautiful or powerful
Connect with a friend you haven't spoken to in a while
Go somewhere new or try something different
Say yes to the social thing
Do your most challenging work today
Move your body in a way that feels strong
Eat light, fresh and colourful food
Take photos — you're glowing
Collaborate — you work well with others right now
Pitch your idea, make your case, tell your story
Celebrate something, even something small
donts: Don't overextend yourself trying to do everything at once
Don't say yes to things you'll resent later
Don't neglect sleep just because energy is high
Don't forget to eat — it's easy to skip meals during this phase
Don't take on other people's emotional labour
Don't ignore your need for quiet time too
Don't make permanent decisions based purely on high energy
Don't confuse confidence with certainty
Don't forget that people who drain you still drain you
Don't skip sunscreen — your skin can be more sensitive
Don't overdo caffeine
Don't let the high mask things that still need attention
Don't forget to drink water
Don't spread yourself too thin just because you can
Don't ignore your body's signals even when energy is high

luteal.tip: Complex carbs and magnesium-rich foods help ease PMS and stabilise mood.
luteal.bodyExplanation: Progesterone is now dominant and estrogen is declining. If the egg wasn't fertilised, your body is preparing to shed the lining again. You might feel more introspective, sensitive or easily overwhelmed. This is completely normal — your nervous system is more reactive right now and you need more rest than usual.
quotes: You don't have to be on all the time.
Boundaries are an act of self-respect.
It's okay to need more than usual right now.
Your feelings are valid — all of them.
You're allowed to turn down the volume on the world.
Protect your peace today.
Not everyone deserves your energy right now.
There is nothing wrong with needing comfort.
Notice what's draining you and step back.
You can feel it all and still be okay.
This is a season of reflection, not failure.
You are not too much. You are just in the luteal phase.
Let yourself want what you want.
Be honest about your limits today.
Your sensitivity is a feature, not a bug.
Take up the space you need.
Rest before you're forced to.
Saying no is a complete sentence.
The world will wait — take care of yourself first.
You've done enough for today.
Let yourself be held by quiet.
Slow and steady is still moving forward.
It's okay if things feel heavier right now.
Protecting your energy is wise, not selfish.
This phase is asking you to come home to yourself.
dos: Go to bed earlier — your body needs more sleep now
Eat magnesium-rich foods like dark chocolate, nuts and seeds
Reduce your to-do list to only the essentials
Say no to at least one thing today
Take a slow walk in nature if you can
Spend time doing something calming and creative
Check in with how you're actually feeling
Eat warm, comforting meals
Reduce caffeine — it can worsen anxiety this week
Tell someone close to you what you need
Do a gentle body scan and notice where you hold tension
Give yourself permission to cancel plans if needed
Drink chamomile or valerian tea in the evening
Do less and be more
Watch or read something that genuinely comforts you
donts: Don't overschedule — you'll feel it more this week
Don't dismiss your emotions as irrational
Don't have important confrontations if you're already depleted
Don't drink alcohol — it worsens PMS symptoms significantly
Don't skip meals — blood sugar crashes hit harder now
Don't compare how you feel now to how you felt last week
Don't take on new big commitments
Don't be hard on yourself for needing more
Don't scroll social media when you're already feeling low
Don't push through exhaustion
Don't isolate completely — light connection helps
Don't overanalyse things — your inner critic is louder now
Don't drink too much coffee
Don't make permanent decisions based on luteal feelings
Don't forget that this will pass in a few days
